caption: A woman with short grey hair and a man with glasses are performing in front of a wood-paneled wall with horizontal slats. The woman wears a light green cardigan over a top and a colorful scarf around her neck. The man is dressed in a white button-down shirt under a dark vest. They both stand before microphones on stands, with a music stand visible in front of the man. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible as they watch the performance. The text "ORCA" appears in the lower right corner of the scene. Across the sequence, the woman and man continue to sing, with their facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as they deliver the lyrics. The woman maintains a smiling expression, while the man's gaze remains focused forward. The positioning of the performers and the audience remains constant throughout the clip.
